tipRules.tip: Johnston: Flip a variety of Texas-rigged plastics to bed fish while watching them on live sonar to monitor locations and reactions. Keep looking and looking until you come across them — with recreational boat traffic stirring the water, persistence is key.

knowledge.insight: Johnston: Where we grew up, it was all largemouth fishing — the smallmouth weren't as relevant. We grew up punching mats, flipping reeds and that kind of stuff.
Johnston: Always have a backup plan ready. At St. Johns, I had one I hadn't needed to use all week but felt the final day would be the day to deploy it — being prepared to pivot is essential.
Johnston: Watch bed fish on live sonar to monitor their locations and reactions to your presentation. This lets you know when they're cooperative and when to move on.
